def configure_logging(level: str) -> None:
    if level == "debug":
        print("Setting debug level")
    elif level == "info":
        print("Setting info level")
    elif level == "warning":
        print("Setting warning level")
    elif level == "error":
        print("Setting error level")


def set_sort_order(order: str) -> list:
    if order == "asc":
        return [1, 2, 3]
    elif order == "desc":
        return [3, 2, 1]
    return []


def apply_format(fmt: str, data: str) -> str:
    if fmt == "json":
        return f'{{"data": "{data}"}}'
    elif fmt == "xml":
        return f"<data>{data}</data>"
    elif fmt == "csv":
        return f"data\n{data}"
    return data


def set_cache_policy(policy: str) -> None:
    if policy == "no_cache":
        pass
    elif policy == "short":
        pass
    elif policy == "long":
        pass
